errors.noSearchResults: No surahs found. Try a different search.
errors.dataLoadHint: Check your internet connection and try again.

home.favoritesEmpty: Mark surahs as favorites to see them here

surah.saveOfflineAriaLabel: Save surah audio for offline use
surah.saveOfflineUnavailable: Offline storage requires a browser that supports cache.

focus.repeatSyncedHint: Repeat settings stay in sync with the Surah page.

language.title: App Language
language.description: Choose the language for menus, buttons, and app messages.

qari.title: Reciter
qari.description: Choose your preferred reciter for audio playback.

playback.title: Playback
playback.description: Adjust on-screen behavior during audio playback.
playback.autoFollowDescription: Automatically scroll so the playing verse stays visible.
playback.murotalEnabledDescription: Play tilawah continuously: advance to the next verse or surah until you stop.
playback.quranComplete: You have reached the end of the Quran.

translation.title: Translation
translation.description: Set the default translation display for verses.

textSize.title: Text Size
textSize.description: Arabic text size on the reading screen and Focus Mode.

offline.title: Offline & Cache
offline.description: Status of saved data for use without internet.
offline.clearCacheDescription: Cached audio will be removed. You'll need an internet connection to download it again.
offline.clearCacheFailed: Failed to clear cache. Please try again.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Adjust the display for a more comfortable experience.
accessibility.smoothAnimationDescription: Turn off to reduce motion on screen.

app.description: Quran memorization platform — per-verse audio, repeat, focus mode, and offline support. No account required. Mobile-first.

mission.title: About HanQuran
mission.purpose: HanQuran helps you memorize and review the Quran through guided audio repetition, distraction-free reading mode, and learning that continues from your last position.

principles.memorizationFirst: Memorization First — every decision is evaluated: does this help memorization?
principles.mobileFirst: Mobile First — designed for small screens and touch.
principles.offlineFirst: Offline First — after download, the app does not depend on the internet.
principles.simplicityFirst: Simplicity First — no registration, no login, no complex setup.

focusItems.repeat: Repeat verse, range, or entire surah
focusItems.focusMode: Focus Mode — one verse, minimal distraction
focusItems.preferences: Local preferences (UI language, reciter, verse display, accessibility)

credits.title: Credits
credits.description: Data sources and core technologies used by the project.

audioMurottal.label: Recitation Audio
audioMurottal.source: The reciters and audio providers used by HanQuran

technology.title: Core technology
technology.stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, Dexie, next-intl

repeat.settingsDescription: Choose how many times and what to repeat.
repeat.targetRangeHint: Repeats a specific range of verses.
repeat.targetEntireSurahHint: Repeats the entire surah from start to finish.
repeat.rangeInvalid: Range must be between 1 and {max}, and From ≤ To.

pwa.installDescription: Open faster from your home screen — ready after downloading audio.
pwa.installIOSHint: In Safari: tap Share, then choose "Add to Home Screen".
